title: Group By - in Dashboard Widgit - Table
excerpt:
Group by is a very poweful feature and should be part of any “table” display, not just boards but also in table widget 
in dashboards and in item card

posts.author: avi.bachar.ap (Avi Bachar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Group by is a very poweful feature and should be part of any “table” display, not just boards but also in table widget
in dashboards and in item card

posts.author: erikab (Erika Beeler)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I just spent too much time creating a new view with numerous widgets only to find out I can’t use the “Group By” feature on the table widget, which has made the entire view useless. Very disappointing.

posts.author: popjaco (Poppy)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree - the table widgets are really limited. I need to be able to group by, as well as restrict the view of certain subitem columns
